items.title: Ghislaine Maxwell pleads the Fifth, doesn't answer House panel's questions
items.description: Ghislaine Maxwell invoked her Fifth Amendment right and refused to answer questions during a virtual appearance before the House Oversight Committee.

items.title: Unredacted Epstein files now available to Congress for review
items.description: The Justice Department made unredacted Epstein files available to members of Congress on Monday. CBS News' Taurean Small has more.

items.description: The Seattle Seahawks defeated the New England Patriots Sunday to win the 2026 Super Bowl.
